items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.0 mph at a 22.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 14, STL 6. Salvador Perez led the night, 3-5 | HR, 2B, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.0 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Cardinals Recap
